Political stability trend: decrease. Risk: 0.238.

alerts.trigger: Gulf economic exposure — remittances, energy, trade (chokepoint: 0.549)
alerts.headline: India: Negotiates Hormuz passage — Gulf exposure persists
alerts.details: India negotiated direct Hormuz passage for two tankers via Modi-Pezeshkian talks — first successful commercial transit since blockade. Demonstrates neutral diplomatic positioning. However, cascading Gulf impact continues: $346cr export cargo stranded, $100B+ GCC remittances at risk, oil import costs surging at $100+/bbl. Chokepoint exposure: 0.549. GDP trend: decrease. Adopting 'strategic indifference' toward Pakistan.

alerts.headline: GLOBAL: Brent crude above $100/bbl — WTI posts biggest weekly gain since 1983
alerts.details: Brent crude surged above $100/bbl with WTI breaking $90/bbl — posting the biggest weekly gain since oil futures trading began in 1983 (35% weekly gain). Iran's new supreme leader declared Hormuz must remain closed. IEA announced record 400M barrel SPR release (US contributing 172M barrels) but this covers only ~25% of the supply gap and takes 60-90 days to reach markets. IEA cut global oil demand growth by 210 kb/d. Goldman Sachs and EIA revised forecasts upward.
alerts.title: GLOBAL: Brent crude above $100/bbl — WTI posts biggest weekly gain since 1983
alerts.description: Brent crude surged above $100/bbl with WTI breaking $90/bbl — posting the biggest weekly gain since oil futures trading began in 1983 (35% weekly gain). Iran's new supreme leader declared Hormuz must remain closed. IEA announced record 400M barrel SPR release but covers only ~25% of supply gap.

alerts.trigger: Hormuz blockade maintained — new supreme leader orders strait closed
alerts.headline: Strait of Hormuz: New Iranian supreme leader orders blockade maintained
alerts.details: Iran's new supreme leader declared the Strait of Hormuz must remain closed. Commercial maritime traffic at effective standstill. Iran selectively allowing some traffic — two Indian tankers passed after Modi-Pezeshkian talks. ~20% of global daily oil supply affected. Trump calls for multinational naval force but US military 'not ready' to escort ships. Jebel Ali port severed from global container trade.
alerts.title: Strait of Hormuz: New Iranian supreme leader orders blockade maintained
alerts.description: Iran's new supreme leader declared Hormuz must remain closed. ~20% of global daily oil supply affected. US military 'not ready' to escort ships.

alerts.trigger: Iran threatens retaliation against Gulf neighbors' oil facilities
alerts.headline: Iran threatens to strike Saudi, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar oil infrastructure
alerts.details: Tehran warned it would hit regional oil facilities in Gulf states if its own energy infrastructure is attacked. This came after US bombed Kharg Island (sparing oil targets) and Trump threatened to 'reconsider' sparing oil infrastructure if Iran interferes with Hormuz shipping. Escalation to Gulf oil facility attacks would catastrophically amplify the energy crisis.
alerts.title: Iran threatens to strike Saudi, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar oil infrastructure
alerts.description: Tehran threatened to hit Gulf neighbors' oil facilities if its own infrastructure is attacked. Escalation risk to energy supply is severe.

alerts.trigger: Israel plans largest Lebanon ground invasion since 2006
alerts.headline: Lebanon: Israel planning massive ground invasion south of Litani River
alerts.details: Israel planning largest ground invasion of Lebanon since 2006, aiming to seize entire area south of Litani River. Death toll at 687 with 800,000 displaced. Lebanon government outlawed Hezbollah military activities. Lebanon proposed ceasefire. Country inching toward internal crisis as Hezbollah's political and military roles clash.
alerts.title: Lebanon: Israel planning massive ground invasion south of Litani River
alerts.description: Israel planning largest Lebanon invasion since 2006. 687 dead, 800,000 displaced. Lebanon outlawed Hezbollah military activities.

alerts.trigger: Israel critically low on ballistic missile interceptors
alerts.headline: Israel: Running critically low on missile interceptors amid Iran war
alerts.details: Israel informed the US it is running critically low on ballistic missile interceptors. Entered the war already depleted from last summer's conflict. Iran adding cluster munitions to missiles, exacerbating depletion. $826M emergency defense procurement approved. IDF officially denied the reports. This creates acute vulnerability to Iranian missile barrages.
alerts.title: Israel: Running critically low on missile interceptors amid Iran war
alerts.description: Israel critically low on interceptors. $826M emergency procurement approved. Acute vulnerability to Iranian missile barrages.

alerts.trigger: Trump threatens to cut off all trade with Spain over base access denial
alerts.headline: Spain: Trump threatens trade cutoff over military base access denial
alerts.details: Trump instructed Treasury Secretary to 'cut off all trade with Spain' after Spain refused to allow US use of Rota and Moron bases for Iran strikes. Spain's PM replied 'No to war.' US relocated 15 aircraft. Legal experts question whether US can embargo individual EU member state. Creates precedent for alliance fragmentation over Iran war.
alerts.title: Spain: Trump threatens trade cutoff over military base access denial
alerts.description: Trump threatened total trade cutoff with Spain after base access denied for Iran strikes. Alliance fragmentation risk.

alerts.trigger: THAAD redeployment from South Korea to Middle East
alerts.headline: South Korea: US redeploying THAAD missile defense to Middle East
alerts.details: Pentagon transferring THAAD battery components from South Korea to Middle East after THAAD radar was damaged by drone strike in Jordan. South Korea's President Lee acknowledged move despite opposition. Raises concerns about Korean Peninsula defense gap. South Korea announced plan to raise defense budget from 2.3% to 3.5% of GDP by 2035.
alerts.title: South Korea: US redeploying THAAD missile defense to Middle East
alerts.description: THAAD battery moving from South Korea to Middle East. Korean Peninsula defense gap emerging.

alerts.trigger: Defense spending surge — Japan, South Korea, Taiwan
alerts.headline: East Asia: Japan, South Korea, Taiwan announce major defense spending increases
alerts.details: Japan advanced counterattack missile capability timeline by two years to March 2026, citing 'most severe security environment since WWII'. South Korea plans to raise defense budget from 2.3% to 3.5% of GDP by 2035. Taiwan increasing defense from 3.3% to 5% of GDP by 2030. Driven by US strategic overstretch in Middle East, THAAD redeployment, and continued Chinese military expansion.
alerts.title: East Asia: Japan, South Korea, Taiwan announce major defense spending increases
alerts.description: Japan, South Korea, Taiwan all accelerating defense buildup amid US overstretch and Chinese expansion.

alerts.trigger: Trade policy disruption — Section 122 + Section 301 tariffs
alerts.headline: USA: Section 122 tariffs + new Section 301 investigations targeting 16 countries
alerts.details: SCOTUS struck down IEEPA tariffs 6-3. Trump responded with 10% Section 122 global surcharge (rising to 15%). 24 states filed lawsuit to block. USTR launched new Section 301 investigations into 'excess manufacturing capacity' targeting 16 countries including China, EU, Japan, South Korea, India, Mexico, Vietnam, Taiwan. US tariffs on China at 47.5%. Signals permanent tariff regime using alternative legal routes.
alerts.title: USA: Section 122 tariffs + new Section 301 investigations targeting 16 countries
alerts.description: Section 122 global tariff at 10-15% + Section 301 investigations targeting 16 countries. Permanent tariff regime emerging.

alerts.trigger: Elections in unstable country — Nepal landslide result
alerts.headline: Nepal: Balen Shah wins landslide election — 182 of 275 seats
alerts.details: Nepal's rapper-turned-politician Balendra Shah, 35, and his Rastriya Swatantra Party won 182 of 275 seats in the March 5 general election. Defeated four-time PM KP Sharma Oli in his own constituency. First election since last year's youth-led uprising that toppled the government. Marks generational shift in Nepali politics.
alerts.title: Nepal: Balen Shah wins landslide election — 182 of 275 seats
alerts.description: Landslide victory for new party marks generational shift. First election since youth uprising.

alerts.trigger: Elections in unstable country — Congo-Brazzaville presidential vote
alerts.headline: Congo-Brazzaville: Presidential election amid internet blackout
alerts.details: Republic of Congo voted in presidential election on March 15, expected to extend Sassou Nguesso's 42-year rule. Internet blackout imposed as voting began. Major opposition parties boycotted. African Union deployed election observation mission. 3.2M registered voters. Democratic quality concerns significant.
alerts.title: Congo-Brazzaville: Presidential election amid internet blackout
alerts.description: Presidential election expected to extend 42-year rule. Internet blackout, opposition boycott.

alerts.trigger: Major leadership change — Chile new government
alerts.headline: Chile: New center-right government takes office — policy shift expected
alerts.details: New government took office in Chile in March 2026, part of broader Latin American political pendulum swing from left toward center-right. Could bring greater policy predictability and institutional maturity to the region's third-largest economy. Positive signal for investors.
alerts.title: Chile: New center-right government takes office — policy shift expected
alerts.description: New government marks Latin American shift toward center-right. Greater policy predictability expected.

alerts.trigger: Russia supplying Iran with Shahed drones and tactical advice
alerts.headline: Russia: Supplying Iran with Shahed drones and intelligence for attacks on US bases
alerts.details: Zelensky stated Russia is supplying Iran with Shahed drones and intelligence used to target US bases — confirmed by Western intelligence. Russian-made components identified inside drones. Trump envoy Witkoff says Kremlin denied involvement. Creates risk of direct US-Russia confrontation escalation through Iran proxy channel.
alerts.title: Russia: Supplying Iran with Shahed drones and intelligence for attacks on US bases
alerts.description: Russia confirmed supplying drones and intelligence to Iran for attacks on US bases. US-Russia escalation risk.

alerts.trigger: US economy shed 92,000 jobs; unemployment 4.4%; recession indicators
alerts.headline: USA: Economy sheds 92K jobs — stagflation concerns mount
alerts.details: February 2026 jobs report showed US economy shed 92,000 jobs vs +59,000 expected. Unemployment rose to 4.4%. Labor force participation fell to 62% (lowest since Dec 2021). Average unemployment duration 25.7 weeks. Goldman Sachs raised stagflation concerns. NY Fed model shows 18.7% recession probability by Jan 2027. Gas prices spiking from Iran war. Dow fell 0.95%, S&P 500 -1.33%, Nasdaq -1.59%.
alerts.title: USA: Economy sheds 92K jobs — stagflation concerns mount
alerts.description: US shed 92K jobs in February. Unemployment at 4.4%. 18.7% recession probability by Jan 2027.

alerts.trigger: US-China tariffs at record levels; Trump-Xi summit expected
alerts.headline: US-China: Tariffs at record levels — Trump-Xi summit expected
alerts.details: Average US tariffs on Chinese goods at 47.5%, China's tariffs on US at 31.9%. China's trade surplus surged to record $213.62B in Jan-Feb (exports +21.8% YoY). NPC approved Five-Year Plan on high-tech and green transition. Trump-Xi summit expected in coming weeks. USTR launching Section 301 investigation targeting China.
alerts.title: US-China: Tariffs at record levels — Trump-Xi summit expected
alerts.description: Tariffs at record levels. China's exports surging despite trade war. Summit expected in weeks.

alerts.trigger: Sudan civil war — world's worst humanitarian crisis
alerts.headline: Sudan: Civil war creates world's worst humanitarian crisis — 25M face hunger
alerts.details: Sudan's civil war killed tens of thousands, creating the world's worst humanitarian and displacement crisis. 25 million face hunger, 12+ million fled homes. Sudan accuses Ethiopia of drone attacks from Ethiopian territory. UAE-allied RSF training camp reported near Ethiopian border. Competing regional interests blocking mediation.
alerts.title: Sudan: Civil war creates world's worst humanitarian crisis — 25M face hunger
alerts.description: World's worst humanitarian crisis. 25M facing hunger, 12M+ displaced. Ethiopia accused of involvement.

alerts.trigger: US sanctions Rwanda military over M23 support in DRC
alerts.headline: Rwanda: US sanctions military and senior officials over M23 support
alerts.details: US Treasury sanctioned the Rwanda Defence Force and four senior officials for 'blatant violations' of Washington Peace Accords and direct operational support to M23 rebels in eastern DRC. Most severe US sanctions on Rwanda in over a decade. Impacts Rwanda's defense sector and bilateral relations with the US.
alerts.title: Rwanda: US sanctions military and senior officials over M23 support
alerts.description: Most severe US sanctions on Rwanda in a decade. Military and officials sanctioned over DRC conflict.

alerts.trigger: Iran war diverts US military from Indo-Pacific — China benefits
alerts.headline: China: Iran war creating strategic opportunity as US overstretch emerges
alerts.details: Iran war diverting US military resources from Indo-Pacific, including THAAD redeployment from South Korea. China's shipyards produced 7 new Type 052D destroyers in 2025. Pentagon facing competing demands between Middle East and Indo-Pacific theaters. War games around Taiwan continue. China's record trade surplus shows economic resilience despite tariffs.
alerts.title: China: Iran war creating strategic opportunity as US overstretch emerges
alerts.description: US military overstretch benefits China. THAAD moved from Korea. China naval buildup continues.

alerts.trigger: Major protests — anti-American protests in Nigeria
alerts.headline: Nigeria: Anti-American protests emerge amid Iran war backlash
alerts.details: Anti-American protests linked to Iranian-backed Islamic Movement of Nigeria (IMN) and broader opposition to US-led war on Iran. Reflects global backlash against US military campaign. Could affect bilateral relations and domestic stability.
alerts.title: Nigeria: Anti-American protests emerge amid Iran war backlash
alerts.description: Anti-American protests from Iran war backlash. IMN-linked. Bilateral relations risk.
